Class ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionElement

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionElement
All Implemented Interfaces:
IExecutionElement
Direct Known Subclasses:
ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionNode, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessConstraint, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessMethodReturnValue, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessValue, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessVariable
Enclosing class:
ExecutionNodeReader
public abstract static class ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionElement extends Object implements IExecutionElement
An abstract implementation of IExecutionElement which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.

    Returns the Proof from which the symbolic execution tree was extracted.

    Returns the Node in KeY's proof tree which is represented by this execution tree node.

    Returns the NodeInfo of IExecutionElement.getProofNode().

    Returns the Services used by IExecutionElement.getProof().
